news.headline: Wayfair shows positive year-over-year growth: $3.1B Q4 net revenue, 21.4M active customers, $1.4B cash, $128M net loss.
news.summary: Wayfair Inc. reported its Q4 2024 financial results with net revenue totaling $3.1 billion and 21.4 million active customers. The U.S. net revenue increased by $30 million, reaching $2.7 billion, while international net revenue decreased to $381 million. Gross profit was $941 million, with a net loss of $128 million and Non-GAAP Adjusted EBITDA of $96 million. For the full year 2024, total net revenue was $11.9 billion, with a net loss of $492 million and Non-GAAP Adjusted EBITDA of $453 million. Active customers decreased by 4.5% year over year, with LTM net revenue per active customer at $555. Orders per customer were at 1.85 for Q4 2024. Repeat customers placed 79.4% of total orders delivered, and average order value was $290.52.4% of total orders were placed via mobile devices in Q4 2024. The detailed financial statements, balance sheets, and consolidated statements of operations can be found in the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Drilling Tools International Corp. expects strong 2024 financial performance, with revenue hitting high-end guidance, adjusted EBITDA near midpoint, adjusted net income surpassing guidance, and adjusted free cash flow doubling from the prior year. CEO Wayne Prejean praises Q4 team execution despite industry challenges. Q4 and full year 2024 earnings call set for March 14, 2025 at 10:00 a.m. ET. (Words: 70)
news.summary: Drilling Tools International Corp. announced its estimated 2024 full year financial outlook, with revenue expected to be at the high end of previously disclosed guidance, adjusted EBITDA near the midpoint, adjusted net income above the high end, and adjusted free cash flow more than double the prior year period. The CEO, Wayne Prejean, expressed satisfaction with the company's performance amidst industry challenges and highlighted successful integration of acquisitions. The company will release its fourth quarter and full year 2024 financial results on March 14, 2025, followed by a conference call accessible by phone or webcast.

news.headline: Tripadvisor, Inc. released Q4 & full year 2024 earnings. Conference call scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET on Feb. 20, 2025. Read at ir.tripadvisor.com.
news.summary: In Needham, Massachusetts on February 20, 2025, Tripadvisor, Inc. (NASDAQ: TRIP) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The earnings press release can be accessed on ir.tripadvisor.com and the SEC's website at www.sec.gov. A conference call is scheduled for February 20, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET to further discuss these results. The live webcast and replay of the call will be available for the public to view. Further information on this news can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Allied Gold Corp. updates 2025 guidance, reserves, and resources. TSX: AAUC, OTCQX: AAUCF. Operating highlights mentioned.
news.summary: In an announcement made on February 20, 2025, Allied Gold Corporation (TSX: AAUC) (OTCQX: AAUCF) shared its operational projections and future prospects for the year. The update includes revisions to the company's Mineral Reserves and Mineral Resources. Notable highlights from this release include details on the Company's operational mines.

news.summary: AS Tallink Grupp hosted an investor webinar on February 20, 2025, during which Paavo Nõgene, the Chairman of the Management Board, along with Management Board members Harri Hanschmidt and Margus Schults, presented the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. news.headline: VALORANT included in HERO ESPORTS ACL, Asia's top multi-title esports tournament lineup with 6 game titles.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Shanghai, the HERO ESPORTS Asian Champions League (ACL) disclosed the inclusion of VALORANT in its debut lineup. This esports tournament, organized by Hero Esports, is one of Asia's top multi-title competitions. Prior to this, ACL had revealed six game titles, including Dota 2.

news.headline: Heimar hf. acquiring Exeter Hotel Properties from Tryggvagata ehf with sellers being MF2 hs. and Laxamýri ehf.
news.summary: Heimar hf. has recently entered into a deal to purchase the entirety of shares in Tryggvagata ehf. The acquisition involves the sale from MF2 hs. and Laxamýri ehf., constituting a significant transaction in the company's operations.

news.headline: GMS Inc. to release Q3 results on March 6, 2025, before NYSE opens. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.summary: Tucker, Georgia - GMS Inc., traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol GMS, a prominent distributor of building products in North America, revealed plans to disclose its financial outcomes for the fiscal Q3 concluded on January 31, 2025, before the NYSE opening on March 6, 2025. The event will include a conference call at 8:30 a.m. EST on the same day, where financials will be analyzed, recent developments discussed, and a Q&A session conducted.

news.headline: Builders FirstSource (NYSE: BLDR) reports Q4 net sales of $3.8 billion, 8.0% decrease due to lower core sales, offsets with acquisitions. Gross margin decreased by 300 bps. Provide 2025 financial outlook.
news.summary: In Irving, Texas, Builders FirstSource, Inc. released its financial results for Q4 and the full year ending on December 31, 2024. The company reported net sales of $3.8 billion for Q4, marking an 8.0% decrease. This decline was primarily attributed to lower core organic sales and commodity deflation, partially offset by acquisitions and an extra selling day. Additionally, the gross margin for the quarter decreased by 300 basis points year-over-year.

news.headline: Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK) reports strong financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 - highlights include solid leasing revenue, robust capital markets growth, and improved free cash flow. Optimistic outlook for 2025.
news.summary: Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK) announced its financial outcomes for the last quarter and entire fiscal year of 2024 in Chicago. Michelle MacKay, the CEO, highlighted the company's successes, noting solid Leasing revenue for the quarter, the most substantial Capital markets expansion since Q1 2022, and notable year-on-year enhancement in free cash flow. The organization starts 2025 with optimism, ready for further growth.

news.headline: Discover effective ways to evaluate Speech Recognition models with key metrics like Word Error Rate and proper noun accuracy for reliable assessments.
news.summary: Learn the importance of effectively evaluating Speech Recognition models by focusing on metrics such as Word Error Rate and accuracy of proper nouns. This ensures reliable and meaningful assessments of the models' performance.

news.headline: New Arkham Exchange has no maker fees & 95% off taker fees, driven by ARKM balance & trades, promising top trading terms.
news.summary: A newly launched exchange, Arkham Exchange, has introduced a unique fee structure. The platform is offering zero maker fees and slashing taker fees by up to 95%. These reduced fees are determined based on ARKM balance and trading volume, providing users with competitive trading conditions.

Clearside Biomedical's partner, Arctic Vision, submits NDA for ARCATUS in China for UME treatment, backed by Phase 3 trial results.
news.summary: In Alpharetta, Georgia on February 20, 2025, Clearside Biomedical, Inc. announced that Arctic Vision’s New Drug Application (NDA) for ARCATUS® intended for treating uveitic macular edema (UME) has been officially acknowledged for evaluation by the Center for Drug Evaluation of China National Medical Products Administration. This application is backed by favorable top-line outcomes from Arctic Vision’s Phase 3 UME clinical study in China. Clearside Biomedical, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as CLSD, specializes in transforming the administration of therapies to the posterior segment of the eye via the suprachoroidal space (SCS®).

news.headline: The Joint Corp. (NASDAQ: JYNT) to discuss Q4 and year-end 2024 results on March 13, 2025 after market close.

news.headline: Linker Finance partners with Bank of Brodhead for Vault.Bank launch, expanding community banking solutions.
news.summary: In Pasadena, California, on February 20, 2025, Linker Finance made a major announcement. The company, specializing in a modern mobile and online banking platform for community banks, revealed an exciting new partnership. They will be teaming up with Bank of Brodhead, a bank from Wisconsin, for the launch of Vault.Bank - a groundbreaking initiative that will redefine the banking experience. This collaboration is set to bring innovative banking services to customers, promising a fresh and advanced approach.

news.headline: Gotcha Covered opens new center in North Tucson run by Kathy Cantoli on Feb 20, 2025. Leader in custom window treatment consultation in U.S. and Canada.
news.summary: In an exciting development, Kathy Cantoli has become part of the franchise family by opening a new Gotcha Covered location in North Tucson/Marana. This custom window treatment consultation leader in the U.S. and Canada, made the announcement on Feb. 20, 2025. Gotcha Covered of North Tucson/Marana marks the latest addition to the company's network, further expanding its reach and service offerings. This move signifies growth and opportunity for both the franchise and the local community.

news.headline: Bybit report on JPY carry trade outlook for 2025, highlights key shifts. Bybit: 2nd largest crypto exchange.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, Bybit, launched a fresh FX Insight report. The report focuses on the Japanese yen (JPY) carry trade, showcasing notable changes that may impact this market.

news.headline: Upbound Group CEO to retire after 40 years, CFO to take over. Tech company addressing needs of underserved consumers.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD) disclosed that Mitch Fadel, the Chief Executive Officer with 40 years of service, is retiring and resigning from the Board. The Company, specializing in accessible financial solutions for underserved consumers, named Fahmi Karam, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, as the new CEO. This significant change comes as the company aims to address the evolving financial needs of its customers with inclusive strategies.

Microchip expands maXTouch M1 Gen to aid large and curved auto displays. Features innovative touch algorithms for superior performance.
news.summary: Cutting-edge touchscreen controllers have been developed to tackle issues related to large screens by utilizing advanced sensing algorithms. These controllers ensure swift and dependable touch functionality, enhancing user experience significantly. They have proven crucial for screens of considerable sizes, offering improved responsiveness and accuracy.

news.headline: UL Solutions Inc. (NYSE: ULS) reports strong Q4 and full year results for 2024, marking a successful first year as a public company.
news.summary: UL Solutions Inc., a global leader in safety science services, announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. The company, listed on NYSE as ULS, reported strong performance during the fourth quarter, marking a successful first year post its public offering. There was consistent growth seen across all segments, service lines, and regions. The team's efforts were commendable, reflecting sustained momentum in the business.

news.headline: Dassault Systèmes announces 3DEXPERIENCE World 2025 in Houston on Feb. 23-26 for SOLIDWORKS users with thousands expected to attend.
news.summary: Dassault Systèmes has revealed that their annual event, 3DEXPERIENCE World 2025, focused on SOLIDWORKS and the 3DEXPERIENCE platform user community, will occur in Houston from February 23 to February 26. This event expects to draw thousands of attendees, including designers, engineers, entrepreneurs, business leaders, makers, and students. It serves as the premier platform for exploring the technologies, trends, and strategies reshaping product development.

news.headline: Fiserv authorized to repurchase 60 million shares of stock in addition to existing authorization.
news.summary: Fiserv, Inc., a prominent global provider of payments and financial services technology, recently revealed that its Board of Directors sanctioned the repurchase of 60 million shares of the company's common stock. This buyback authorization is an addition to the existing shares available for repurchase. Fiserv has the flexibility to repurchase these shares either through open market transactions or through privately negotiated deals, based on management's evaluation. The company's stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol FI.

news.headline: Corsair's Elgato Stream Deck Studio wins Best of Show Award at ISE 2025, leading AV & broadcast exhibition.
news.summary: In Milpitas, California, Corsair Gaming, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRSR) revealed that their Elgato Stream Deck Studio achieved the Best of Show Award at ISE 2025, a top professional AV and broadcast exhibition. The Elgato Stream Deck Studio, known for its cutting-edge innovation in live production control, stood out among competitors. Corsair is a global leader in high-performance products catering to gamers, streamers, content creators, and gaming PC builders. This award highlights the company's dedication to pushing boundaries in the industry.

news.headline: PE and VC fund accountants expect tech changes in 2025, per Dynamo Software survey. AI, automation, and analytics to drive transformation, with challenges in data integration and ESG reporting.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Dynamo Software in Boston reveals that by the year 2025, artificial intelligence (AI), automation, and analytics are expected to revolutionize fund accounting. However, the survey also highlights potential obstacles such as difficulties in data integration and environmental, social, and governance (ESG) reporting. This transformation in fund accounting is projected to significantly impact the industry, showcasing the increasing importance of incorporating advanced technologies.

news.headline: Upbound Group, Inc. discloses Q4 and full year 2024 results, with a conference call scheduled at 9 a.m. ET. CEO and CFO to host.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:UPBD) revealed their financial outcomes for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. Interested parties can access the earnings release, financial tables, and accompanying documents on the Company's investor relations page at https://investor.upbound.com. A conference call is scheduled for today at 9 a.m. ET, led by Mitch Fadel, Chief Executive Officer, and Fahmi Karam, Chief Financial Officer, to discuss the financial figures and offer insights into projections for 2025.

news.headline: San Francisco Equity Partners acquires majority stake in Formula Corp, a leading cleaning products developer. Co-founders remain shareholders.
news.summary: San Francisco Equity Partners (SFEP), a private equity firm in San Francisco, has recently acquired a majority stake in Formula Corp, a prominent formulator and contract manufacturer of cleaning products. The terms of this acquisition have not been publicly disclosed. The co-founders of Formula Corp, Chas Werner and Alan Gangl, will remain shareholders in the company. Formula Corp is known for its innovative approaches in the industry.

news.headline: Walmart increases annual dividend by 13% to $0.94/share, marking 52nd year of increases. Paid in 4 installments.
news.summary: Walmart Inc.'s Board of Directors, at its headquarters in Bentonville, Arkansas, approved an annual cash dividend of $0.94 per share for fiscal year 2026. This marks a significant 13% increase from the previous fiscal year's dividend of $0.83 per share. Shareholders can expect to receive the $0.94 per share dividend in four quarterly installments of $0.235 per share each. The record dates for eligibility to receive the dividend are March 21, 2025, and the payable dates are scheduled for April 7, 2025, and May 9, 2025.

news.headline: Shake Shack releases Q4 2024 financial results, to host conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET with CEO Robert Lynch and CFO Katherine Fogertey.
news.summary: Shake Shack Inc. has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending December 25, 2024. The company's Shareholder Letter can be accessed on its Investor Relations website. A conference call is scheduled at 8:00 a.m. ET, led by CEO Robert Lynch and CFO Katherine Fogertey. Shake Shack is listed on the NYSE under the symbol SHAK. For more details, refer to the Q4 2024 Shareholder Letter on the company's website.

news.headline: Superior Industries will release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results in Southfield, Mich., and host a conference call.
news.summary: Superior Industries based in Southfield, Michigan, has announced they will be releasing their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. They will also be hosting a conference call in relation to this release.

news.headline: EnviroGold Global's non-brokered private placement's first tranche closed, generating CDN $3,682,595.1 in gross proceeds.
news.summary: Toronto, February 20, 2025 - EnviroGold Global Limited, a clean technology company specializing in monetizing mine waste and tailings to reduce environmental impact, has completed the first tranche of a non-brokered private placement. The company, trading as CSE: NVRO, OTCQB: ESGLF, and FSE: YGK, announced that the first tranche of this placement generated gross proceeds totaling $3,682,595.1. This successful fundraising effort marks a significant step for EnviroGold in its mission to address environmental and social challenges associated with mining activities.

news.headline: Luckin Coffee reveals financial results for Q4 and FY2024.
NODAR & Leopard Imaging partner to showcase 3D vision at NVIDIA GTC 2025, integrating Hammerhead software & GMSL2 cameras.
news.summary: A collaboration has been formed between NODAR and Leopard Imaging to showcase advanced 3D vision abilities at NVIDIA’s GTC conference from March 17th to 21st, 2025. NODAR, known for stereo vision technology, and Leopard Imaging, a prominent player in intelligent vision design and production, are partnering to combine NODAR’s Hammerhead software with Leopard Imaging’s GMSL2 cameras. The integration will feature Leopard Imaging’s IMX031 based solutions running on the NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin Platform. This partnership aims to highlight the cutting-edge advancements in 3D vision technology, with a special focus on showcasing their capabilities at the upcoming NVIDIA conference.

news.headline: "Americold reports Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, exceeding expectations."
Agios Pharmaceuticals will present at TD Cowen 45th Annual Healthcare Conference on March 3, 2025, 10:30 am ET.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, based in CAMBRIDGE, Agios Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: AGIO) disclosed plans for its management team to participate in the TD Cowen 45th Annual Healthcare Conference on March 3, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. ET. The company, known for its work in cellular metabolism and PK activation therapies for rare diseases, is set to present at the conference.

news.headline: atai Life Sciences closed public offering with 26,190,477 common shares and 3,928,571 additional shares at $2.10 each s raising $63.25 million.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, atai Life Sciences (NASDAQ: ATAI) completed its public offering of 26,190,477 common shares. Following this, on February 17, 2025, the underwriter opted to purchase an extra 3,928,571 common shares at a price of $2.10 per share, exercising their full option. The underwriter's acquisition was finalized on February 19, 2025. The total gross proceeds generated from this offering and the additional share purchase amount to around $63.25 million before deduction of underwriting discounts, commissions, and other associated offering expenses incurred by atai Life Sciences as a part of this transaction focused on revolutionizing mental health disorder treatment.
